candidate.raw_title: ENHYPEN World Tour BLOOD SAGA 2026 – Macau

citations.title: TWICE Announces ‘This Is For’ 2026 World Tour - Pollstar News
citations.cited_text: TWICE “THIS IS FOR” WORLD TOUR DATES: 2025 DATES (PREVIOUSLY ANNOUNCED): Sat Oct 04 – Bulacan – Philippine Arena · Sat Oct 11 – Singapore – Singapore ...

citations.title: List of Twice concert tours - Wikipedia
citations.cited_text: Their sixth concert tour, the This Is For World Tour, began in Incheon in July 2025 and concluded in July 2026.

samples.text:
Based on the search results, the Wikipedia article on the *This Is For* World Tour shows the full tour schedule. 
TWICE's Singapore stop on the "This Is For" World Tour was at the **Singapore Indoor Stadium** on **October 11–12, 2025**
 — not at Singapore National Stadium on November 14–15, 2026. 
Their sixth concert tour, the *This Is For* World Tour, began in Incheon in July 2025 and concluded in July 2026
, with no Singapore National Stadium dates in November 2026 found anywhere. Additionally, the raw candidate title references "ENHYPEN World Tour BLOOD SAGA 2026 – Macau," which conflicts entirely with the claimed artist (TWICE) and city (Singapore).

---

**VERDICT:** UNCONFIRMED
**ARTIST_MATCH:** false *(raw title names ENHYPEN, not TWICE)*
**DATE_MATCH:** false
**VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH:** false
**MATCHED_DATES:** none
**SOURCE_QUALITY:** reliable_media
**SOURCE_URLS:** https://news.pollstar.com/2025/09/30/twice-announces-this-is-for-2026-world-tour/, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/This_Is_For_World_Tour
**REASON:** No qualifying source places TWICE at Singapore National Stadium on 2026-11-14/15; the only confirmed Singapore stop was at Singapore Indoor Stadium on 2025-10-11/12, and the raw candidate title contradicts the claimed artist entirely.
